jobs.title: Senior Software Developer (m/f/d) Java/Kotlin with Spring Boot
jobs.description:
Do you want to build software that truly makes an impact? At etalytics, we develop intelligent energy management solutions that help industrial companies reduce energy consumption, lower CO₂ emissions, and cut costs. With our AI- and data-driven products, we actively contribute to a more sustainable future.

As a Senior Software Developer, you will join our backend team in Darmstadt and work on our etaONE® platform. You will take technical ownership, actively contribute to architectural

jobs.title: Associate Product Manager, Delivery (m/f/d)
jobs.description:
We are looking for a Associate Product Delivery Manager to help turn product priorities into clear, well-organized work for our engineering and design teams.

Working closely with our Product Lead, you will help define new features, prepare upcoming work, coordinate requirements, and keep track of sprint progress. You will bring structure and clarity to the product-development process while growing your product-management skills through hands-on experience and mentorship.
